title: CCL - Close/reopen the tab and the settings screen
scenario: Call Control Lock (CCL) setting does not persist after closing and reopening the Advanced tab in Device Settings
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap on the connected device name → Device Settings
Set the CCL (Call Control Lock) toggle to ON (or OFF)
Close the Advanced tab by tapping the back arrow or navigating away
Observe the CCL toggle value again
expected: The CCL (Call Control Lock) setting retains its previously selected value (ON or OFF) after closing and reopening the Advanced tab, and after navigating back to the Home screen and re-entering Device Settings > Advanced.
